Dialog.name: MSG_704_000
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}This one's from the Lovers Arcana... It's the source of the mind manipulation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_704_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 2}Unforgivable... I'll never forgive you for that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_704_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}Please be careful! That mist can hypnotize you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_704_220
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}It's the same as before. Look out for the enemy's psychological attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_704_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 5 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}Watch out! It's dangerous to get hit by that attack while you're charmed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_704_310
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}Please support each other while you're fighting![n]{f 1 1}
